# Nuelltech — AI & Process Automation for SMEs

**Last Updated:** July 2026
**Location:** Vila Real, Portugal
**Website:** https://nuelltech.com

## Overview
Nuelltech transforms scattered data and manual processes into automated business management decisions. We specialize in profit margin protection, raw materials cost checking, inventory prediction, and AI-enabled voice trainers. We build off-the-shelf SaaS products and design custom software integrations.

---

## Products & Services

### RCM · Restaurant Cost Management
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/rcm (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/rcm (EN)
- **Category:** SaaS Product
- **Target Audience:** Restaurants / F&B Sector
- **Core Functionality:** Scans supplier invoices via OCR, automatically updates recipe sheets, calculates profit margins against retail prices (PVP), generates automated purchase orders, and alerts when ingredient prices spike.

### Auditor Pro
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/auditor-pro (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/auditor-pro (EN)
- **Category:** SaaS Product
- **Target Audience:** Restaurants / F&B Sector
- **Core Functionality:** Simulates operational margins. Input total sales, fixed costs, and food cost % to test business resilience under inflation. Identifies exact customer increments needed to cover fixed cost inflation or supplier price rises.

### Voice Sales Simulator
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/simulador-vendas (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/simulador-vendas (EN)
- **Category:** Closed Beta SaaS Product
- **Target Audience:** Commercial Teams (Automotive, Real estate, Pharma)
- **Core Functionality:** Voice-based conversational training using ElevenLabs (text-to-speech / speech-to-text) and Claude. Simulates challenging negotiations with skeptical or busy clients and provides structured scorecards on persuasion, empathy, and objection handling.

---

## Custom Engineering (Case Studies)

### BI Pharma
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/engenharia-a-medida/bi-pharma (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/engenharia-a-medida/bi-pharma (EN)
- **Core Functionality:** Merges independent sales data and physical inventory databases to predict product waste prior to expiration dates. Automatically recommends calendar-based cross-selling promos.

### Logistics Platform
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/engenharia-a-medida/logistica (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/engenharia-a-medida/logistica (EN)
- **Core Functionality:** Replaces manual shared spreadsheets with a secure multi-user web/mobile app featuring permission roles for administrators and delivery drivers. Reconciles driver collections in real-time.

---

## R&D / Lab

### VIUNU
- **URL:** https://nuelltech.com/pt/laboratorio (PT) / https://nuelltech.com/en/laboratorio (EN)
- **Core Functionality:** High-precision astronomical API integration (NASA ephemerides Horizon reference) sending calculations to Claude API to generate formatted astrological profile PDFs. Proves technical ability to query scientific datasets.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### Does Nuelltech only work with restaurants?
No. While we offer specific SaaS products for restaurants, our core data processing engines (OCR, database reconciliation, AI assistants) are vertical-agnostic and apply to gyms, pharmacies, clinical material supplier invoices, and retail.

### How long does implementation take?
Standard SaaS configurations take a few days. Custom engineering projects take between 3 to 6 weeks.

### How much does it cost?
Pricing is determined on a case-by-case basis. We start with a 30-minute free diagnostic call to analyze current workflows and verify ROI.

---
